app.name: FIFA Control Room
app.subtitle: World Cup match and market trading center.

dashboard.title: World Cup Trading Board
dashboard.description: Follow matches, markets, wallet balances, and orders in one place.
dashboard.missingProjectId: Wallet connection is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
dashboard.walletInfoDescription: Current BNB Smart Chain session and wallet metadata.
dashboard.walletConnectHint: Connect your wallet to view balances and orders.

banner.title: World Cup 2026
banner.description: Live World Cup predictions and odds.

invite.title: Add invite code
invite.description: This wallet is not registered yet. You can enter an invite code or skip it; skipping will omit this parameter.
invite.validationRequired: Enter an invite code to continue registration, or click Skip.

matchList.error: Failed to load match list. Please try again later.

marketGrid.error: Failed to load market list. Please try again later.

matchDetail.error: Failed to load match details. Please try again later.

exact.error: Failed to load exact scores. Please try again later.

halftime.error: Failed to load halftime result. Please try again later.

marketDetail.error: Failed to load market details. Please try again later.

orderPanel.unsupportedMarket: This market does not support orders yet
orderPanel.emptyDescription: Choose a moneyline, spread, or total market from the match list. The panel will sync to the selected market template.

orderErrors.unsupportedMarket: This market does not support orders yet.
orderErrors.missingEventSlug: This market is missing eventSlug and cannot submit an order.
orderErrors.missingMarketSlug: This market is missing marketSlug and cannot submit an order.
orderErrors.missingConditionId: This market is missing market conditionId and cannot submit an order.
orderErrors.invalidConditionId: This market conditionId is invalid and cannot submit an order.
orderErrors.missingGammaMarketId: This market is missing Gamma marketId and cannot submit an order.
orderErrors.missingTokenId: This market is missing tokenId and cannot submit an order.
orderErrors.invalidCurrentPrice: Current buy price is invalid and cannot submit an order.
orderErrors.oddsTooLow: Current odds are below {{odds}} and cannot be traded.
orderErrors.slippageExceeded: Price slippage exceeded the threshold. Click again to confirm the trade.
orderErrors.submitRetry: Failed to submit order. Please try again later.

profile.title: Profile
profile.walletHint: Connect a wallet to manage assets

connection.disconnectedMessage: No wallet connected yet. Connect one to view account, assets, deposits, withdrawals, and records.
connection.pendingLoginMessage: Wallet connected. Complete signature login to view assets and fund records.

account.error: Failed to load account info. Please try again later.
account.unavailable: Current account info is unavailable. Please try again later.

fundsConfig.error: Failed to load fund config. Please try again later.

orders.title: Order history
orders.loginRequired: Complete wallet login to view orders.
orders.error: Failed to load orders. Please try again later.

history.loginRequired: Complete wallet login to view records.
history.error: Failed to load records. Please try again later.

relation.title: Invite relation
relation.error: Failed to load invite data. Please try again later.
relation.directError: Failed to load direct invite list. Please try again later.
relation.umbrellaError: Failed to load umbrella user list. Please try again later.
relation.directLoginRequired: Complete wallet login to view direct invite users.
relation.umbrellaLoginRequired: Complete wallet login to view umbrella users.

rewards.title: Reward records
rewards.description: View credited direct invite and node reward details.
rewards.loginRequired: Complete wallet login to view reward records.
rewards.error: Failed to load reward records. Please try again later.

errors.timeout: Wallet authentication timed out. Please try again later.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Backend authentication service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.failed: Wallet authentication failed. Please try again.
errors.missingToken: Backend did not return a token, so a session cannot be created.
errors.invalidSignature: Wallet did not return a valid signature. Please try again.
errors.unsupportedNetwork: Only BSC wallet network is supported. Please switch networks and try again.
errors.loginNoData: Wallet login returned no valid data. Please try again later.
errors.unregisteredExpiredSignature: Backend returned unregistered, but the current signature has expired. Click Connect wallet again and retry.
errors.registrationExpiredSignature: Registration signature expired. Click Connect wallet again and retry.
errors.registerNoData: Wallet registration returned no valid data. Please try again later.

errors.conflict: Multiple wallet extensions were detected and may compete for the same transaction. Use Connect wallet to choose the wallet you want and complete login; the system will bind that wallet before deposits or withdrawals.
errors.duplicateProviderConflict: Browser wallet Provider conflict detected. Temporarily disable unused wallet extensions, or keep only MetaMask / TokenPocket enabled, then refresh and try again.
errors.notEvmProvider: The selected wallet is not an EVM wallet Provider. Reconnect a BSC wallet and try again.
errors.boundProviderMissing: The current session is bound to {{provider}}, but the browser cannot find the same Provider. Disconnect and reconnect that wallet, then try again.
errors.noMatchingProvider: No wallet Provider matching the connected address was found. Reconnect your wallet and try again.
errors.noMatchingProviderRefresh: No wallet Provider matching the logged-in address was found. Refresh the page and reconnect the current wallet.
errors.missingProvider: No wallet Provider is currently available. Reconnect your wallet and try again.
errors.invalidTxHash: Wallet did not return a valid transaction hash.

errors.invalidSignature: Deposit signature validation failed. Ask the backend to confirm the signature content and contract signing rules match exactly.
errors.invalidParam: Deposit parameter validation failed. Check whether order number, amount, and signature match contract requirements.
errors.orderIdUsed: This order ID has already been used. Create a new deposit order and try again.
errors.insufficientBalance: Wallet USDT balance is insufficient for this deposit.
errors.failed: Deposit failed. Please try again later.
errors.callbackPending: The on-chain deposit transaction succeeded, but backend credit confirmation is not complete yet: {{message}}. Click "Notify backend again" later, and do not submit the same deposit again.
errors.orderIdPrecision: Order ID precision is invalid. Ask the backend to return it as a string and try again.
errors.receiptReverted: Deposit transaction was submitted on chain but failed to execute. USDT was not deposited; check the transaction details.
errors.callbackNoData: Deposit callback returned no valid data.
errors.backendNotProcessed: Backend has not completed credit processing yet.
errors.walletClientNotReady: Wallet client is not ready. Please try again later.
errors.configLoading: Deposit config is loading. Please try again later.
errors.missingUsdtAddress: BSC USDT contract address was not found. Refresh and try again.
errors.minAmount: Current minimum deposit amount is {{amount}} USDT.
errors.invalidContractAddress: Backend did not return a valid deposit contract address.
errors.invalidBackendSignature: Backend did not return a valid deposit signature.

success.submitted: Withdrawal request submitted and pending review

errors.failed: Withdrawal request failed. Please try again later.
errors.configLoading: Withdrawal config is loading. Please try again later.
errors.minAmount: Current minimum withdrawal amount is {{amount}} USDT.
errors.maxAmount: Current maximum withdrawal amount is {{amount}} USDT.
errors.exceedsBalance: Withdrawal amount cannot exceed the current available balance.
